guardduty.detector.CfnAbout: The `AWS::GuardDuty::Detector` resource specifies a new Amazon GuardDuty detector. A detector is an object that represents the Amazon GuardDuty service. A detector is required for Amazon GuardDuty to become operational.

guardduty.detector.DataSources.Description: Describes which data sources will be enabled for the detector.

guardduty.detector.Enable.Description: Specifies whether the detector is to be enabled on creation.

guardduty.detector.FindingPublishingFreq.Description: Specifies how frequently updated findings are exported.
